daily_limit.title: Daily Call Limit
daily_limit.description: Free tier daily call limit per IP address. Default is 1,000 calls/day. No signup or API key required.

backend_url.title: Backend URL
backend_url.description: QuantOracle REST API base URL. Override only if running a self-hosted instance.

description: QuantOracle requires no configuration for the free tier (1,000 calls/day). All options below are optional.
